AreaPerPerson.description: The area per person is representative of the square meters each person occupies within the building or space.

FemalePercentage.description: Percentage of Females of the total occupant count of the building or space.

GenderNeutralPercentage.description: Percentage of Gender Neutral of the total occupant count of the building or space.

MalePercentage.description: Percentage of Males of the total occupant count of the building or space.

OccupantCount.description: The total number of people that occupy the building or space.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
